title: Directory search has gotten really slow since the profiles launch
description:
Since we shipped owner profile cards on search results (1.4), directory search feels way slower. Support has had a handful of complaints this week and I can reproduce it: common queries like "plumber" or "electrician" take 2-3 seconds to return, and it used to be basically instant.

Timing from the app logs: `GET /api/search?q=plumber` is ~2.4s server-side, so it's not a frontend rendering thing.

My guess is the in-memory index isn't cutting it anymore and we need to move listings into SQLite, or the ranking pass is doing something quadratic on the bigger candidate sets. Can someone take a look before the paid listings push next week?
